comment.body:
Alma, the two key concepts that you have shared with us that have been tremendous for me are:

1) Less time in the market = better risk management
2) Positive size > win rate

Because of this I have traded less and profited more. And today was a big example of that as I took a large short position yesterday at SPX 6900 as I had a ton of conviction and thought it was one of those times to take the risk. Thanks for sharing and giving me this guidance!
